chunks.title: Athaliah Seizes Power and Joash is Hidden
chunks.reason: Describes the immediate aftermath of Ahaziah's death and the secret preservation of the heir.

chunks.title: The Coronation of Joash
chunks.reason: Details the covenant with commanders, the preparation of guards, and the crowning ceremony.

chunks.title: Athaliah's Downfall
chunks.reason: Narrates Athaliah's arrival at the temple, her reaction to the noise, and her execution.

chunks.title: Covenant Renewal and Consolidation of Power
chunks.reason: Outlines the covenant between God, king, and people, the destruction of Baal's temple, and Joash's official enthronement.
